probes.name: tax-schema-migrations-applied
probes.description: Confirms every migration this module ships has run: tax_rates, tax_jurisdictions, tax_exemptions, tax_calculations, plus their indexes.

probes.name: tax-rate-effective-range-index-present
probes.description: Confirms the composite index on tax_rates (tenant_id, tax_jurisdiction_id, rate_type, effective_from, effective_to) exists. Missing this index makes rate resolution O(N) — every calculation becomes a table scan.

probes.name: tax-provider-drivers-registered
probes.description: Confirms every advertised provider (via #[AsTaxProvider]) is registered with the TaxProviderManager + its createXxxDriver factory resolves without errors. Fails hard when a provider driver class is missing.

probes.name: tax-provider-schemas-loaded
probes.description: Confirms every data/providers/<provider>-config.schema.json is present + parseable. Missing schemas would make provider config create silently accept invalid credentials.

probes.name: tax-jurisdiction-catalog-loaded
probes.description: Confirms data/jurisdiction-country-catalog.json is loaded + the league/iso3166 library resolves. Missing = valid_country_code + valid_state_code validators silently accept invalid values.

probes.name: tax-blocked-invoice-lines
probes.description: Counts invoice_lines where tax_calculation_id IS NULL AND last-attempted TaxCalculationFailed within past 60 min. Non-zero = P1 tax pipeline degradation.

probes.name: tax-open-circuit-breakers
probes.description: Reads count of tax provider configs with circuit_breaker_open_until IS NOT NULL AND > now(). Non-zero = at least one tenant × provider has tax calculation degraded.

probes.name: tax-pending-exemption-verification-backlog
probes.description: Warns when > 100 tax_exemptions rows are in verification_status='pending' for > 48h. Indicates verification workflow is stalled.

probes.name: tax-expiring-exemptions
probes.description: Counts verified exemptions with valid_until between now() and now()+7 days that have NOT yet been warned. Feeds the NotifyExemptionExpiringJob cadence health check.

probes.name: tax-calculation-drift-rate
probes.description: Reads the trailing 7-day drift-detection rate from ReconcileProviderCalculationsJob. > 1% drift triggers a warning; > 5% triggers a P1 alert.

probes.name: tax-encryption-key-rotated
probes.description: Warns when the encryption key used for tax_provider_configs.config + tax_exemptions.certificate_document_url has not been rotated in > 90 days. Delegated to the compliance/encryption service's rotation cadence.

probes.name: tax-provider-health-per-tenant
probes.description: For each (tenant, provider) with is_active=true: reports success_rate + circuit_breaker_state + last_success_at. Feeds the platform ops dashboard.
